qoq_changes: Total assets increased to $682.17 billion from $624.89 billion at year-end 2024.
Property and equipment (net) increased by $44.95 billion since year-end 2024, reflecting massive infrastructure build-out.
Cash and cash equivalents decreased to $57.74 billion from $78.78 billion at year-end 2024, partially offset by increased marketable securities.
new_risks: Massive acceleration in capital expenditures ($107.66B in 1H25) heightens ROI and execution risks for cloud and AI infrastructure.
Technology and infrastructure operating expenses rose 21.8% YoY to $27.17 billion, outpacing overall revenue growth.
management_tone: Bullish; strong top-line growth and significant operating leverage (net income up 34.7%) are funding an aggressive, confident expansion in technology and infrastructure.
analyst_note: Amazon delivered a highly profitable Q2 2025 with $167.7B in revenue and $18.16B in net income, but the defining narrative is the staggering 80% YoY surge in first-half CapEx to $107.6B, signaling an all-out arms race in AI and cloud infrastructure.
